MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-21-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR CHANGE OF NAME. PETITIONER SUMMER LYNN STARR WAS SWORN AND EXAMINED. THE COURT GRANTS DECREE CHANGING PETITIONER'S NAME TO ARLO ORION STARR. DECREE SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: KAREN FARNSWORTH, #5162. (503)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-21-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for change of name. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: V. Mu; Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, #5162. Petitioner Summer Lynn Starr was sworn and examined. The Court grants Decree changing Petitioner's name to Arlo Orion Starr. Decree signed and filed in open court. (503)
